prompt: Turn node where barrel risk exceeds gain: choose action.
why_v1: Call to control turn risk and keep the pot manageable. Raising here overcommits with limited upside.
feedback_correct_v1: Correct. Checkback controls risk in this turn node.
feedback_incorrect_v1: Incorrect. When the turn barrel risks more than it wins, checking back keeps the pot manageable and avoids overcommitting.
